goals: run a trading competition this fall

cards.idea: Partner with established trading competition platforms like CME Group's University Trading Challenge to run a professionally-hosted fall competition that provides simulated trading access and legitimacy.
cards.whyItFitsYou: Crestview Trading Club needs a credible, turnkey competition model to execute its fall trading event while establishing sponsorship relationships with recognized industry players.

evidence.claim: CME Group University Trading Challenge is a complimentary electronic trading competition that allows students to experience real-time trading with teams of undergraduate and graduate students trading CME Group products on a professional platform

comparables.name: CME Group University Trading Challenge
comparables.whyComparable: Offers a free, professionally-managed trading competition for college students with simulated platform and real-world asset classes
notablePlays: Attracts sponsors from top financial firms

comparables.name: K-State Investment Club Stock Market Competition
comparables.whyComparable: Runs an annual departmentally-backed stock market competition open to all students from November to April

comparables.name: Flagler College Financial Investment Club
comparables.whyComparable: Combines beginner-friendly mock trading competitions with guest speakers and plans for student-managed investment fund
notablePlays: Hands-on experience with community impact focus

executionSteps: Contact CME Group's University Trading Challenge to register Crestview as an official participating team and secure competition dates
Leverage CME's Day of Market Education day to host guest speakers and build sponsor relationships
Promote the official CME platform affiliation in membership drives to demonstrate legitimacy and differentiate from other campus clubs

cards.idea: Develop a tiered guest speaker series with finance professionals and fund managers to attract sponsors seeking talent pipeline access and differentiate membership value.
cards.whyItFitsYou: Crestview's stated goals include landing sponsors and growing membership; professional speakers create tangible member value while offering sponsors direct student audience access.

evidence.claim: The Investment Club provides opportunities for members to learn about investment management from business professionals through on-campus meetings and employer visits, with members attending the Berkshire Hathaway Annual Meeting

Flagler's Financial Investment Club combines beginner friendly discussions, mock trading competitions, and guest speakers to help students learn market strategies and develop confidence in financial decisions

executionSteps: Map local finance firms and asset managers willing to sponsor monthly speaker slots in exchange for branded club events
Structure speakers into beginner (market basics), intermediate (strategy), and advanced (career paths) tiers to appeal across experience levels
Create formal sponsorship packages that quantify audience reach (current + projected membership growth) to pitch to financial services companies

cards.idea: Emphasize student-managed investment fund experience and hands-on trading platforms as core membership benefits to attract quality members amid growing competition from finance clubs.
cards.whyItFitsYou: Multiple peer clubs now offer simulated trading and Bloomberg Terminal access; Crestview must signal competitive differentiation through real portfolio management and professional tools to grow membership strategically.

evidence.claim: Focus on developing quality members who embody the club's mission rather than reactive growth

executionSteps: Establish a Crestview Student Managed Investment Fund with real capital and Bloomberg Terminal access as flagship membership benefit
Create transparent admissions criteria emphasizing fit with club mission over raw numbers to attract committed members
Market the fund's real portfolio performance and professional tool access in recruitment to position Crestview as elite alternative to casual trading clubs
